sql-v2.title: SQL Foundations
sql-v2.description: Learn to read tables, write SELECT queries, filter rows, sort results, and handle real-world beginner data.
sql-v2.moreComingSoon: More SQL Foundations lessons are coming soon.

sql-v2-0.title: Getting Started with SQL and Databases
sql-v2-0.description: Build a strong visual foundation for SQL: what SQL is, how tables work, how databases answer questions, and how to use the SQL workspace.
outcomes: Explain what SQL is used for in real applications.
Identify tables, rows, columns, records, and fields.
Read simple table data and describe what it means.
Use the browser SQL workspace to run a beginner query.
why: Builds confidence with getting started with sql and databases.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-v2-1.title: Your First Queries with SELECT
sql-v2-1.description: Teach learners to retrieve data confidently with SELECT and FROM before filtering or joining tables.
outcomes: Write SELECT queries that retrieve data from one table.
Choose specific columns instead of always selecting every column.
Use FROM to identify the table being queried.
Read a query result table and explain what was returned.
why: Retrieval is the foundation for every later SQL task.
Focused result columns make queries easier to understand and maintain.

sql-v2-2.title: Filtering Data with WHERE
sql-v2-2.description: Introduce decision-making in queries by teaching learners to keep only the rows they actually need.
outcomes: Use WHERE to return only rows that match a condition.
Compare text and numbers with beginner SQL operators.
Combine conditions with AND, OR, and NOT.
Debug common filtering mistakes in simple SQL queries.
why: Filtering turns a full table into an answer to a specific question.
Clear condition logic prevents reports from including the wrong rows.

sql-v2-3.title: Sorting and Limiting Results
sql-v2-3.description: Help beginners control output so answers are easier to read, rank, and compare.
outcomes: Sort query results with ORDER BY.
Use ASC and DESC to control sort direction.
Use LIMIT to show a smaller result set.
Combine filtering, sorting, and limiting in one query.
why: Sorting and limiting make query results useful for comparison and ranking.
Deterministic output is essential for reports, reviews, and automated checks.

sql-v2-4.title: Working with Text, Lists, Ranges, and NULL
sql-v2-4.description: Expand filtering to real-world cases like partial text, multiple choices, ranges, and missing values.
outcomes: Search partial text with LIKE and wildcards.
Filter multiple values with IN and NOT IN.
Filter ranges with BETWEEN.
Find missing and present values with IS NULL and IS NOT NULL.
why: Real datasets require flexible text, list, range, and missing-value filters.
Explicit cleanup rules make incomplete customer data easier to review safely.

sql-v2-5.title: Capstone: Customer Follow-Up Report
sql-v2-5.description: Pull the course skills together in one final reporting task that feels like a beginner analyst handoff.
outcomes: Combine selection, filtering, ordering, and limiting in one practical query flow.
Revise a working query without losing earlier progress.
Build a clean report that highlights real customer follow-up needs.
why: Builds confidence with capstone: customer follow-up report.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-v2-sql-v2-0-1.title: What SQL Is
sql-v2-sql-v2-0-1.description: Understand what SQL means, what databases are, and why SQL is useful.
bullets: SQL helps answer questions about data
Real systems use databases every day

sql-v2-sql-v2-0-2.title: Understanding Tables
sql-v2-sql-v2-0-2.description: Learn how rows, columns, records, fields, and names make table data readable.
bullets: Names help you understand the table

sql-v2-sql-v2-0-3.title: Database Thinking
sql-v2-sql-v2-0-3.description: Practice thinking about data as questions, structure, and reliable identifiers.

sql-v2-sql-v2-0-4.title: First SQL Environment
sql-v2-sql-v2-0-4.description: Use the Zoeskoul SQL workspace to run queries and read result tables.
bullets: Use the Tables view as support

sql-v2-sql-v2-0-module-project.title: Module Project
sql-v2-sql-v2-0-module-project.description: Apply the module introduction by exploring a student roster.

sql-v2-sql-v2-1-1.title: SELECT and FROM
sql-v2-sql-v2-1-1.description: Build complete single-table queries by choosing result columns and naming the source table.
bullets: Use SELECT to define result columns
Use FROM to identify the source table

sql-v2-sql-v2-1-2.title: Choosing Result Columns
sql-v2-sql-v2-1-2.description: Choose between every column and a focused explicit column list.

sql-v2-sql-v2-1-3.title: Readable Multi-Column Queries
sql-v2-sql-v2-1-3.description: Arrange and format several selected columns for a clear result.
bullets: Review the result shape before running

sql-v2-sql-v2-1-4.title: Predicting and Debugging
sql-v2-sql-v2-1-4.description: Predict what a query will return and repair common syntax mistakes.

sql-v2-sql-v2-1-module-project.title: Module Project
sql-v2-sql-v2-1-module-project.description: Learn module 1 product starter sheet project through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Choose only the product columns needed for a clear starter report.
Arrange selected columns in an intentional, readable order.
Write a complete SELECT and FROM query without syntax errors.
Deliver the Module 1 Product Starter Sheet.

sql-v2-sql-v2-2-1.title: WHERE and Exact Matching
sql-v2-sql-v2-2-1.description: Filter source rows and use exact or not-equal comparisons.

sql-v2-sql-v2-2-2.title: Numeric and Typed Comparisons
sql-v2-sql-v2-2-2.description: Choose strict or inclusive boundaries and match the value type.

sql-v2-sql-v2-2-3.title: Combining Conditions
sql-v2-sql-v2-2-3.description: Use AND, OR, NOT, and parentheses without changing the intended logic.

sql-v2-sql-v2-2-4.title: Filtering Debugging
sql-v2-sql-v2-2-4.description: Test filter logic and repair common condition mistakes.
bullets: Add conditions one at a time
Distinguish valid syntax from correct logic

sql-v2-sql-v2-2-module-project.title: Module Project
sql-v2-sql-v2-2-module-project.description: Learn module 2 inventory watchlist project through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Filter product rows with exact, boundary, text, number, and date comparisons.
Combine business rules with AND, OR, parentheses, and NOT.

sql-v2-sql-v2-3-1.title: ORDER BY Fundamentals
sql-v2-sql-v2-3-1.description: Understand what sorting changes and where ORDER BY belongs.

sql-v2-sql-v2-3-2.title: Sort Directions
sql-v2-sql-v2-3-2.description: Use ASC and DESC with text, numeric, and date values.
bullets: Choose direction from the reporting goal

sql-v2-sql-v2-3-3.title: Multi-Column Sorting
sql-v2-sql-v2-3-3.description: Use primary and secondary sort columns to make ties predictable.
bullets: Read sort columns left to right

sql-v2-sql-v2-3-4.title: Ranked and Limited Results
sql-v2-sql-v2-3-4.description: Combine filtering, sorting, and LIMIT to build useful top or bottom lists.

sql-v2-sql-v2-3-module-project.title: Module Project
sql-v2-sql-v2-3-module-project.description: Learn module 3 sales leaderboard project through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Sort results in ascending or descending order for the reporting goal.
Use primary and secondary sort keys for predictable output.
Combine ORDER BY and LIMIT to create a useful ranking.

sql-v2-sql-v2-4-1.title: Text Patterns
sql-v2-sql-v2-4-1.description: Search prefixes, suffixes, fragments, and fixed character positions.
bullets: Choose the wildcard that matches the requirement

sql-v2-sql-v2-4-2.title: Lists and Ranges
sql-v2-sql-v2-4-2.description: Filter several exact choices and inclusive ranges.
bullets: Combine list or range filters with other rules

sql-v2-sql-v2-4-3.title: Missing Values
sql-v2-sql-v2-4-3.description: Understand NULL and test missing values correctly.
bullets: Distinguish NULL from zero or empty text
Find missing values with IS NULL
Explain what a missing value means

sql-v2-sql-v2-4-4.title: Cleanup Filters
sql-v2-sql-v2-4-4.description: Require present values and combine text, status, and missing-data rules.
bullets: Apply text patterns to present values

sql-v2-sql-v2-4-module-project.title: Module Project
sql-v2-sql-v2-4-module-project.description: Learn module 4 customer cleanup project through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Search text with LIKE, percent, and underscore patterns.
Filter value lists and inclusive ranges with IN, NOT IN, and BETWEEN.
Handle missing values with IS NULL and IS NOT NULL.
Deliver the Module 4 Customer Cleanup report.

sql-v2-sql-v2-5-capstone-project.title: Capstone Project
sql-v2-sql-v2-5-capstone-project.description: Learn module 5 customer follow-up capstone through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Translate a stakeholder request into the required result columns and filters.
Combine list, range, text-pattern, and NULL checks in one query.
Sort and limit the result into a usable customer follow-up queue.
Deliver the final Customer Follow-Up Capstone report.
